title: Urban Ladder is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Urban Ladder is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
